				and a.IsPkAttribute = 1

				from AttributeView a

				on at.AttributeTypeId = a.AttributeTypeId

update MetadataSchema.Attribute
								set AttributeRequiredLevelId = @systemRequired
								where AttributeId in 
								(
									select customAttr.AttributeId
									from MetadataSchema.Attribute systemAttr inner join MetadataSchema.Attribute customAttr on systemAttr.AttributeId = customAttr.AttributeId
									where systemAttr.AttributeRequiredLevelId =  @systemRequired
									and systemAttr.SolutionId = @systemSolutionId
									and customAttr.SolutionId <> @systemSolution
